modification_notice: Extracted sentence text from the pinned CoNLL-U file, applied Unicode NFC and whitespace normalization, removed exact within-source duplicates, and added input-only candidate metadata; no converter output or expected text was used.
known_biases: Learner essays contain non-native wording and source errors that require sentence-level quality review.
The corpus is not representative of Taiwan product UI, technical, legal, medical, or financial language.
Domain and conversion-risk labels remain unset until input-only review.
A maximum of 10% of the final candidate pool may come from this source.
